description:
You are an environmental compliance officer at the California Air Resources Board (CARB). Conduct a PM2.5 monitoring coverage gap assessment for California counties using EPA Air Quality System (AQS) monitoring site data (/home/ga/GIS_Data/epa_pm25_monitors_ca.geojson) and California county boundaries (/home/ga/GIS_Data/ca_counties.geojson).

Export a GeoJSON FeatureCollection of all 58 California counties to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/pm25_coverage_gaps.geojson. Retain all original county fields and add the following:
- monitor_count (integer): number of active PM2.5 monitoring sites within the county boundary.
- nearest_monitor_km (
